name: No Bogeys Golf
address: 27601 Forbes Rd UNIT 28, Laguna Niguel, CA 92677
about: No Bogeys Golf is a premier performance golf center in Orange County, California, equipped with state-of-the-art TrackMan technology for game improvement and virtual play. They offer professional instruction, custom club fitting, and a private indoor practice facility with hourly bay rentals. The facility is dedicated to helping golfers of all levels improve through data-driven coaching and personalized equipment services, with a focus on consistency and performance optimization.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball data analysis
Comprehensive club fitting and building services with over 20 years of experience
Top-50 rated club fitting by Golf Digest and Golf Magazine
Supportive, non-franchise environment with passionate, expert staff
Junior programs and family-friendly amenities for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar Technology with TrackMan4 for launch monitor and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or No Bogeys offers club rentals and a full range of custom club fitting services to provide you with properly fitted equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted. It's best to contact the venue directly for clarification on their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and number of players, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours for a group of four players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, No Bogeys offers junior golf programs, private lessons for ages 6-18, and family-friendly bay rentals, making it a great option for young golfers.
